title: Tristate does not propagate in Altera's BRAM

features.name: tri0 signal driven by logic signal in module port
features.description: Code should include a tri0 typed signal in a module port being driven by a regular logic signal
features.snippet: module ram(input tri0 wren_a, input logic wen); assign wren_a = wen; endmodule

features.name: dual_port bram with tri0 write enable
features.description: Code should include a dual-port BRAM-style module with tri0 typed write enable signals
features.snippet: module altsyncram(input clock0, input tri0 wren_a, input tri0 wren_b, input logic [3:0] addr_a, input logic [15:0] data_a); endmodule

features.name: logic to tri0 connection in instantiation
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where a logic signal is connected to a tri0 port
features.snippet: mod1 inst(.wren_a(wen)); // wen is logic, wren_a is tri0
